questionHtml: Explain how an increase in the top rate of direct tax from 32 % to 36 % might affect equity and efficiency in Country A.
markschemeHtml: NB A response which explains that inequality will be reduced, without explicitly using the term equality/inequality, should be rewarded.

meta.title: Explain how an increase in the top rate of direct tax from 32 % to 36 % might affect equity and efficiency in Country A.
